plugins.name: review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: arch-debate
plugins.description: Multi-perspective architecture advisory sessions with personalized advisors (Kleppmann, Uncle Bob, Evans). Orchestrates structured debates using ACH methodology.

plugins.name: rfc
plugins.description: RFC document generation for architecture review. Interactive interview to gather context, codebase exploration, and structured RFC output using a standardized template.

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Universal skills for everyday development workflows — planning, decision-making, and critical thinking.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: DevOps skills for containerization and deployment — Docker expertise for multi-stage builds, image optimization, security hardening, and Compose orchestration.
